description: CompositionPink sleeveless printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neckline, buttoned chest placket with lace, lace around the armholes, pin-tucks on either sides of the placket and a curved, vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThis kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which will keep you cool in warm weather. The pretty lace adds to your femininity. Wear this over jeans or leggings, depending on the occasion and dress it up or down with your choice of accessories.Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
